paper.title: SOP-Bench: Complex Industrial SOPs for Evaluating LLM Agents

checks: The downloaded object is a readable PDF 1.7 document; pdfinfo reports the title, complete byline, and 27 pages.

The 170,066-byte layout-preserving extraction is readable from the title and abstract through the main method/results, agent and generation appendices, real-SOP examples, synthetic patient sample, and final tool-specification listing.

The immutable arXiv source archive passed gzip/tar inventory checks. Its 23 regular files include the complete TeX manuscript and section appendices, bibliography, example-SOP PDF, figures, and arXiv metadata.
The arXiv API record resolves to immutable v2 metadata and its summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
warnings: The file utility reports a 14-page PDF while pdfinfo and verified extraction page boundaries report 27 pages; the manifest and index use pdfinfo.
The arXiv API spells one author as Weian Chan, while the PDF byline extraction spells that name Weian Chen. The manifest preserves the API metadata and flags the discrepancy for review.

official_release.timing_boundary: This acquisition-time main commit is dated more than three months after immutable arXiv v2. It is an author-owned post-v2 release snapshot and must not be treated as the exact paper-time implementation without file-level correspondence evidence.

hugging_face_dataset.timing_boundary: The pinned dataset revision postdates immutable arXiv v2 and is not assumed to be the paper-time dataset.

github_correspondence_at_pinned_revision.interpretation_boundary: The two pinned public surfaces are closely related but not byte-identical. Their differences require review before either is used as a proxy for the paper's exact experimental corpus.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable arXiv v2 PDF and source archive, extracted layout-preserving full text, verified readable coverage through the paper and appendices, and archived acquisition-time author-owned GitHub and Hugging Face releases at immutable revisions with resolved LFS objects. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep review, result reproduction, expert-authorship audit, release-correspondence finding, or evidence of tacit transfer, expert equivalence, occupational or professional validity, real-world consequence, cross-domain capability, safety, production fitness, or readiness.
review_handoff: The queued review should read the complete local extraction and immutable source, inspect both pinned release surfaces and their six differing common files plus one GitHub-only file, reconstruct authoring/validation and task/oracle lineage, run relevant release tests, verify counts and headline results, and preserve the task's stated claim ceilings.
local_storage_note: The PDF, arXiv source archive, and release ZIPs are ignored local evidence; the extracted full text, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs/revisions and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
